title: lycianthes amatitlanensis
intro: Lycianthes amatitlanensis, also known as the Mexican honeysuckle, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Solanaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In traditional medicine, Lycianthes amatitlanensis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its therapeutic uses, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
